ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elaine Chiu (petitioner) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Susana Chan (mother of decedent's daughter in law) appeared in propria persona for the purpoe of assisting with translation.
James Chiu (Elaine's son) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

When asked if any written directions from the testator with respect to disposing of items of tangible personal property were found, Mrs. Chiu responded "No.". When asked if she understands what she needs to do to administer the estate, Mrs. Chiu responded "Yes.". No one present objects to the petition. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 2, 2015 is admitted to probate. Elaine Chiu is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for August 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for April 29, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
